scripts.test:e2e: npm run obc && npm run segA && npm run collection:mobile && npm run segV && npm run cashV
scripts.test:daily: npx playwright test --config web/playwright.config.js --headed; node test-cases/update-results.js
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.login:smoke: dotenv -e loadtest/.env -- k6 run -e ENV=preprod -e SCENARIO=smoke loadtest/scenarios/per-api/login.js
scripts.login:load: dotenv -e loadtest/.env -- k6 run -e ENV=preprod -e SCENARIO=load loadtest/scenarios/per-api/login.js

scripts.login:soak: dotenv -e loadtest/.env -- k6 run -e ENV=preprod -e SCENARIO=soak loadtest/scenarios/per-api/login.js
